Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Establishes the Redeveloping Empty and Vacant Infrastructure for Vibrant Economies Act or the REVIVE Act
Summary: Provides for the adaptive reuse of certain parcels which are zoned for commercial, office, retail, or parking.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to providing for the adaptive reuse of certain parcels which are zoned for commercial, office, retail, or parking
